phase_name: Phase S — Agent 能力第一轮提升

eval_summary.conclusion: Manifest ReAct instructions neutral for Qwen3.5-27B. Scorer improvements (answer extraction + fuzzy matching) fixed infrastructure but did not change pass rate. Model capability is the bottleneck.

notes: Phase S COMPLETE. All 13 tasks done. Key findings: (1) GAIA scorer improved with answer extraction + fuzzy matching. (2) AgentConfig serde bug prevented all manifest loading — fixed. (3) Jina num>20 bug caused search failures — fixed. (4) Qwen3.5-27B GAIA pass rate ~39% regardless of manifest/search strategy — model capability bottleneck. Run 4 continues in background for full 142-task data.

deferred.description: Agent Skills 系统是否符合标准 Agent Skills 规范 — 专题研究
